composio_registry_match.description: Brex provides corporate credit cards, spend management, and financial tools tailored for startups and tech businesses to optimize cash flow, accounting, and growth

description: A unified spend management platform providing corporate cards, expense tracking, bill pay, and travel booking capabilities.
notes: Authentication is primarily via User/Developer API tokens; the platform typically requires a business account with admin access to generate production credentials.
